SMALL CLAIM APPEALS

RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar Feb-01-2005 Continued To Feb-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 504
MINI MINUTES: Matter comes on as regularly scheduled for Trial de novo of small claims appeal.
Present: Nicholas Carlin, Esq. plaintiff in pro per; Michael Pierrera, Esq., for defendant Fillo, Deborah Vongsohn, Esq. for defendant Pittman, and parties Fillo and Pitman.
The matter is argued and submitted to the court for decision.
Judge: Mary Wiss; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; not reported.
